description: Luxury ocean-view living awaits in this END-UNIT 3 bed/3 bath townhome at Boardwalk.No direct neighbours behind, enjoy year-round views of the ocean,Gulf Islands&park.This bright 1341 sqft home offers open-concept living with oversized windows,bonus end-unit light,AC&a main floor powder room.Upstairs ft. 3 spacious bedrooms, including a primary suite w/ WIC & 4pc ensuite+2bdrms have ocean views. Thoughtful details include AC, high end appliances. A private fenced yard & balcony overlooking the park,while the dbl tandem garage provides parking &storage.Boardwalk residents enjoy resort-style amenities includ.a Beach House clubhouse w/ pool, hot tub, gym,lounges & more. Steps to transit,oceanside trails,minutes to Tsawwassen Mills & restaurants & only 25 minutes to YVR.
